channel.title: Quantum Computing on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Quantum Computing on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Quantum AI Drug Discovery
item.description:
Introduction to Quantum AI Drug Discovery  

The field of artificial intelligence (AI) has been rapidly advancing in recent years, with applications in various industries, including healthcare. One of the most significant areas of research is the use of AI in drug discovery, which involves the identification of potential drug candidates and the optimization of their properties. Recently, scientists at the Technical University of Denmark (DTU) have made a breakthrough in this area by using a quantum computer to improve the accuracy and reach of generative AI drug discovery models.
